parameters.query:
SELECT e.id, e.gmail_message_id, e.gmail_thread_id, e.subject,
       e.from_email, e.from_name, e.body_stripped, e.snippet,
       e.has_attachments, e.has_ics_attachment,
       ec.classification, ec.sub_category, ec.is_urgent, ec.sender_type
FROM emails e
JOIN email_classifications ec ON ec.email_id = e.id
WHERE e.status = 'classified'
    AND ec.classification NOT IN ('not_job_related', 'marketing')
ORDER BY
    CASE ec.classification
        WHEN 'interview_invite' THEN 1
        WHEN 'offer' THEN 2
        WHEN 'follow_up_request' THEN 3
        WHEN 'recruiter_outreach' THEN 4
        WHEN 'acknowledgment' THEN 5
        WHEN 'rejection' THEN 6
        WHEN 'job_alert' THEN 7
    END ASC
LIMIT 10;

parameters.jsCode:
// Build extraction prompt based on classification
const items = $input.all();
const results = [];

const extractionPrompts = {
  interview_invite: `Extract interview details from this email. Return ONLY valid JSON:
{
  "company_name": "<company>",
  "role_title": "<role>",
  "interview_date": "<YYYY-MM-DD or null>",
  "interview_time": "<HH:MM or null>",
  "interview_timezone": "<timezone, default Europe/London>",
  "interview_duration": "<e.g. 45 minutes or null>",
  "interview_format": "<phone|video|in_person|assessment|panel|informal>",
  "interview_platform": "<Teams/Zoom/etc or null>",
  "interview_location": "<address or null>",
  "interview_link": "<URL or null>",
  "interviewer_name": "<name or null>",
  "interviewer_title": "<title or null>",
  "interviewer_email": "<email or null>",
  "contact_person": "<name>",
  "contact_email": "<email>",
  "preparation_instructions": "<any prep info or null>",
  "what_to_bring": "<items to bring or null>",
  "dress_code": "<dress code or null>",
  "next_steps": "<what candidate should do>",
  "response_deadline": "<YYYY-MM-DD or null>",
  "extraction_confidence": <0.0-1.0>
}`,

  rejection: `Extract rejection details. Return ONLY valid JSON:
{
  "company_name": "<company>",
  "role_title": "<role or null>",
  "rejection_reason": "<stated reason or null>",
  "rejection_stage": "<application|shortlisting|interview|final_round>",
  "feedback_offered": <boolean>,
  "next_steps": "<any future suggestions>",
  "extraction_confidence": <0.0-1.0>
}`,

  acknowledgment: `Extract application acknowledgment details. Return ONLY valid JSON:
{
  "company_name": "<company>",
  "role_title": "<role or null>",
  "reference_number": "<ref number or null>",
  "review_timeline": "<stated timeline or null>",
  "expected_response_date": "<YYYY-MM-DD or null>",
  "contact_person": "<name or null>",
  "contact_email": "<email or null>",
  "next_steps": "<any stated next steps>",
  "extraction_confidence": <0.0-1.0>
}`,

  recruiter_outreach: `Extract recruiter outreach details. Return ONLY valid JSON:
{
  "recruiter_name": "<name>",
  "recruiter_email": "<email>",
  "recruiter_phone": "<phone or null>",
  "agency_name": "<agency or null>",
  "proposed_role_title": "<role title>",
  "proposed_company": "<company or null>",
  "proposed_salary_raw": "<salary as stated or null>",
  "proposed_salary_min": <number or null>,
  "proposed_salary_max": <number or null>,
  "proposed_location": "<location or null>",
  "next_steps": "<what they want>",
  "extraction_confidence": <0.0-1.0>
}`,

  offer: `Extract job offer details. Return ONLY valid JSON:
{
  "company_name": "<company>",
  "role_title": "<role>",
  "salary_offered": <annual salary number or null>,
  "salary_details": "<full salary info>",
  "start_date": "<YYYY-MM-DD or null>",
  "contact_person": "<name>",
  "contact_email": "<email>",
  "next_steps": "<what to do>",
  "response_deadline": "<YYYY-MM-DD or null>",
  "extraction_confidence": <0.0-1.0>
}`,

  follow_up_request: `Extract follow-up request details. Return ONLY valid JSON:
{
  "company_name": "<company>",
  "role_title": "<role or null>",
  "action_required": "<what they need>",
  "action_deadline": "<YYYY-MM-DD or null>",
  "documents_requested": ["<list of docs>"],
  "contact_person": "<name>",
  "contact_email": "<email>",
  "next_steps": "<what to do>",
  "extraction_confidence": <0.0-1.0>
}`,

  job_alert: `Extract job listings from this alert email. Return ONLY valid JSON:
{
  "source_platform": "<linkedin|indeed|reed|totaljobs|etc>",
  "total_jobs_count": <number>,
  "jobs_listed": [
    {"title": "<title>", "company": "<company>", "location": "<location>", "url": "<url or null>"}
  ],
  "extraction_confidence": <0.0-1.0>
}`
};

for (const item of items) {
  const email = item.json;
  const classification = email.classification;
  const prompt = extractionPrompts[classification] || extractionPrompts['acknowledgment'];

  results.push({
    json: {
      ...email,
      extraction_prompt: prompt
    }
  });
}

return results;

parameters.query:
BEGIN;

INSERT INTO email_extracted_data (
    email_id, classification,
    company_name, role_title, contact_person, contact_email, contact_phone,
    next_steps, response_deadline,
    interview_date, interview_time, interview_timezone, interview_duration,
    interview_format, interview_platform, interview_location, interview_link,
    interviewer_name, interviewer_title, interviewer_email,
    preparation_instructions, what_to_bring, dress_code,
    rejection_reason, rejection_stage, feedback_offered,
    reference_number, review_timeline, expected_response_date,
    recruiter_name, recruiter_email, recruiter_phone, agency_name,
    proposed_role_title, proposed_company, proposed_salary_raw,
    proposed_salary_min, proposed_salary_max, proposed_location,
    salary_offered, salary_details, start_date, offer_conditions,
    action_required, action_deadline, documents_requested,
    source_platform, jobs_listed, total_jobs_count,
    extraction_confidence, extraction_notes,
    input_tokens, output_tokens, cost_usd
) VALUES (
    '{{ $json.email_id }}'::uuid,
    '{{ $json.classification }}',
    {{ $json.sql.company_name }}, {{ $json.sql.role_title }},
    {{ $json.sql.contact_person }}, {{ $json.sql.contact_email }}, {{ $json.sql.contact_phone }},
    {{ $json.sql.next_steps }}, {{ $json.sql.response_deadline }},
    {{ $json.sql.interview_date }}, {{ $json.sql.interview_time }},
    {{ $json.sql.interview_timezone }}, {{ $json.sql.interview_duration }},
    {{ $json.sql.interview_format }}, {{ $json.sql.interview_platform }},
    {{ $json.sql.interview_location }}, {{ $json.sql.interview_link }},
    {{ $json.sql.interviewer_name }}, {{ $json.sql.interviewer_title }},
    {{ $json.sql.interviewer_email }},
    {{ $json.sql.preparation_instructions }}, {{ $json.sql.what_to_bring }},
    {{ $json.sql.dress_code }},
    {{ $json.sql.rejection_reason }}, {{ $json.sql.rejection_stage }},
    {{ $json.sql.feedback_offered }},
    {{ $json.sql.reference_number }}, {{ $json.sql.review_timeline }},
    {{ $json.sql.expected_response_date }},
    {{ $json.sql.recruiter_name }}, {{ $json.sql.recruiter_email }},
    {{ $json.sql.recruiter_phone }}, {{ $json.sql.agency_name }},
    {{ $json.sql.proposed_role_title }}, {{ $json.sql.proposed_company }},
    {{ $json.sql.proposed_salary_raw }},
    {{ $json.sql.proposed_salary_min }}, {{ $json.sql.proposed_salary_max }},
    {{ $json.sql.proposed_location }},
    {{ $json.sql.salary_offered }}, {{ $json.sql.salary_details }},
    {{ $json.sql.start_date }}, {{ $json.sql.offer_conditions }},
    {{ $json.sql.action_required }}, {{ $json.sql.action_deadline }},
    {{ $json.sql.documents_requested }},
    {{ $json.sql.source_platform }}, {{ $json.sql.jobs_listed }},
    {{ $json.sql.total_jobs_count }},
    {{ $json.sql.extraction_confidence }}, {{ $json.sql.extraction_notes }},
    {{ $json.input_tokens }}, {{ $json.output_tokens }}, {{ $json.cost_usd }}
)
ON CONFLICT (email_id) DO NOTHING;

UPDATE emails SET status = 'extracted', extracted_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $json.email_id }}'::uuid;

COMMIT;
